epigraph.quote: We ate supper at Alcide, in the big square with lots of sail boats.

per_stop.quote: we have camped in some trees beside the racecourse
the first house liberated (now a café) & the position where the 3 gliders crash landed. 00.19 hrs June 6th 1944
There were race horses being shown off in a courtyard in front of a building. We saw trotters on the beach earlier in the day.
